qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_preferencia as oi_preferencia, t0.c_preferencia as c_preferencia, t0.d_preferencia as d_preferencia, SEC.policy, t0.c_preferencia as CODE, t0.d_preferencia as TEXT FROM POS14_PREFERENCIAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Preferencias.PREFERENCIA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_preferencia LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_preferencia asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_preferencia as oi_preferencia, SEC.policy FROM POS14_PREFERENCIAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Preferencias.PREFERENCIA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_preferencia LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_preferencia asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Preferencias.PREFERENCIA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Preferencias.PREFERENCIA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS14_PREFERENCIAS.oi_preferencia) as CNT from POS14_PREFERENCIAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS14_PREFERENCIAS.oi_preferencia={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS14_PREFERENCIAS.d_preferencia,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS14_PREFERENCIAS.c_preferencia,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
